channel.title: Networking on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.
channel.description: Recent content in Networking on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.

item.title: The Importance Of Conversation
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about the importance of conversation.

item.title: Networking With Game Developers
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about networking, something that I have never been good at but that I recommend you do.

item.title: PAX 2024
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about pxs 2024.

item.title: Unused GDC 1999 Roadtrip Presentation
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about RPG 2000.

item.title: Game Conferences
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about game conferences.

item.title: GDC Showcase 2023
item.description: Hey everyone. I just wanted to announce that on Wednesday, June 28th at 1 pm, the GDC showcase is going to re-air my classic game postmortem on Fallout, and I will be doing a live chat at the same time, answering all the attendees Fallout related questions. There’s a link below, if you want to attend, thanks.
